rules.rule_text:
rule scanline_mcafee
{
	meta:
		author = "@patrickrolsen"
		reference = "http://www.mcafee.com/us/downloads/free-tools/scanline.aspx"
		filetype = "EXE"
		version = "0.1"
		date = "1/30/2014"

	strings:
		$s1 = "CPports.txt"
		$s2 = "ICMP Time"
		$s3 = "Foundsto"
		$s4 = "USER"
		$s5 = {55 50 58 ??}

	condition:
		uint16( 0 ) == 0x5A4D and ( all of ( $s* ) )
}
